title: T-002 — Migration: bom_headers, bom_lines, bom_co_products, bom_snapshots
prompt: Create Drizzle migration with BOM family of tables per §5.2. `bom_headers`(id PK, org_id, item_id FK items, version INT default 1, status TEXT in {draft,approved,active,superseded}, yield_pct NUMERIC(6,3) default 100, effective_from DATE, effective_to DATE, approved_by, approved_at, notes, created_at, UNIQUE(org_id,item_id,version)). `bom_lines`(id PK, bom_header_id FK ON DELETE CASCADE, line_no INT, component_item_id FK items, quantity NUMERIC(14,6), uom TEXT, scrap_pct NUMERIC(5,2) default 0, manufacturing_operation_name TEXT, sequence INT, is_phantom BOOL default false, notes, UNIQUE(bom_header_id,line_no)). `bom_co_products`(id PK, bom_header_id FK ON DELETE CASCADE, co_product_item_id FK items, quantity, uom, allocation_pct NUMERIC(6,3), is_byproduct BOOL default false, UNIQUE(bom_header_id,co_product_item_id)). `bom_snapshots`(id PK, org_id, work_order_id UUID nullable, bom_header_id FK, snapshot_json JSONB NOT NULL, snapshot_at TIMESTAMPTZ default now()). Enable RLS on all four tables with org_id isolation. RED test in tests/db/bom.migration.test.ts. Command: `pnpm vitest run tests/db/bom.migration.test.ts`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Drizzle migration creating BOM headers/lines/co-products and immutable bom_snapshots, all RLS-scoped.
pipeline_inputs.details: bom_snapshots.work_order_id stays UUID nullable — FK will be added in 08-PRODUCTION. snapshot_json must be NOT NULL JSONB. Statuses are TEXT with CHECK constraints (no DB enum types — keeps L3 extensibility). is_phantom and is_byproduct default false. Add index idx_bom_snapshots_wo on bom_snapshots(org_id, work_order_id) to speed lookups.
acceptance_criteria: Given a clean DB, when migration runs, then bom_headers, bom_lines, bom_co_products, bom_snapshots exist with FK and CHECK constraints per §5.2.
Given a bom_header is deleted, when querying bom_lines and bom_co_products, then dependent rows are removed (ON DELETE CASCADE).
Given RLS enabled, when org context is missing, then no rows are visible across all four tables.
Given the migration is re-applied, when it runs twice, then it is idempotent.
test_strategy: Write RED tests asserting CASCADE delete, RLS isolation, and CHECK constraints.
risk_red_lines: Do not add work_order FK constraint here — table lives in 08-PRODUCTION.
Do not write any seed BOM rows.
